CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM users WHERE name NOT LIKE 'A%';
SELECT * FROM users WHERE name NOT LIKE '%e';
SELECT * FROM users WHERE name NOT LIKE '_a%';
SELECT * FROM users WHERE name NOT LIKE 'C%' AND id <= 3;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT name FROM users WHERE id > 1) AS subquery WHERE name NOT LIKE 'B%';
CREATE TABLE products (id UInt32, product_name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT p.product_name FROM products p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.id WHERE p.product_name NOT LIKE '%o%';
SELECT name FROM users WHERE name NOT LIKE (SELECT 'C%' UNION ALL SELECT 'A%');
SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE name NOT LIKE '%l' AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE product_name NOT LIKE 'M%');
SELECT id FROM users WHERE NOT (name NOT LIKE 'David' OR id = 1);
